reviews.review_description: This game might be the world's most laggy game in the world. I tried the game out because it looked pretty fun and now my headset is sitting on my bed still on because of how laggy it is. Now I have to wait for the battery to run out so I can play VR again. It might just be my experience but I did not like it very much. You should get this game to try it out and see that it might be laggy and my review might be correct.

developer_response.body:
Hi kboys16 what headset are you using? as the Avg. Device Frame Rate is 70.7 FPS in the performance details across all headsets
​

reviews.review_description: Good litte Platform-Game, but needs work in all aspects.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and yes lots still to do but wanted to start showing and get some early feedback, if you have any pop into the discord and can chat :)
